节点.功能描述: Render according to the original image, including colors.
Render the image as a template image, ignoring the color information of the image.
Specify image's content.
Make image empty.
Allow image content to use an unrestricted extended range.
Allow image content to use some extended range.
Restrict the image content dynamic range to the standard range.

Bilinear Interpolation.

Cubic interpolation offers the highest interpolation quality, but may impact image rendering speed.

Ignore the rotation of the image
Based on image rotation, rotate clockwise 90 degrees
Based on image rotation, rotate clockwise 180 degrees
Based on image rotation, rotate clockwise 270 degrees

The value of the status of the image being loaded successfully. If the returned status value is 0, the image data is successfully loaded. If the returned status value is 1, the image is successfully decoded.

The height of the picture that is actually drawn.

节点.签名: (src: PixelMap | ResourceStr | DrawableDescriptor, imageAIOptions: ImageAIOptions): ImageAttribute
节点.功能描述: Set src and ai options to obtain images
Defines source size of image.
Image decode width. The unit of the number type is vp. Anonymous Object Rectification.
Image decode height. The unit of the number type is vp. Anonymous Object Rectification.
Defines the ColorContent.
Indicates the ColorContent to original value.

Sets the placeholder image displayed during loading.

NOTE:
This attribute does not take effect when the parameter type of the component is AnimatedDrawableDescriptor.
注释信息: @param { string | Resource | PixelMap } value - Placeholder image displayed during loading, Default value is null.

parameters.说明: Placeholder image displayed during loading, Default value is null.

节点.功能描述:
Specifies whether to display the image in the system language direction.

NOTE:
This attribute does not take effect when the parameter type of the component is AnimatedDrawableDescriptor.
注释信息: @param { boolean } value - Whether to display the image in the system language direction, Default value is false.

parameters.说明: Whether to display the image in the system language direction, Default value is false.

节点.功能描述:
Sets whether the display size of the image follows the source size.

NOTE:
This attribute does not take effect when the parameter type of the component is AnimatedDrawableDescriptor.
注释信息: @param { boolean } value - Whether to fit the image to the size of the image source, Default value is false.

parameters.说明: Whether to fit the image to the size of the image source, Default value is false.

节点.功能描述:
Sets the fill color to be superimposed on the image. By default, no fill color is applied. If an invalid value is passed, the system uses the default theme color: black in light mode and white in dark mode.

NOTE:
This attribute applies only to SVG images.
This attribute does not take effect when the parameter type of the component is AnimatedDrawableDescriptor.
注释信息: @param { ResourceColor } value - Fill color to be superimposed on the image.

parameters.说明: Fill color to be superimposed on the image.

节点.功能描述:
Sets the fill color to be superimposed on the image. By default, no fill color is applied. If an invalid value is passed, the system uses the default theme color: black in light mode and white in dark mode.

NOTE:
This attribute applies only to SVG images.
This attribute does not take effect when the parameter type of the component is AnimatedDrawableDescriptor.
注释信息: @param { ResourceColor | ColorContent } color - Fill color to be superimposed on the image.

parameters.说明: Fill color to be superimposed on the image.

节点.功能描述:
Sets the fill color to be superimposed on the image. By default, no fill color is applied. If an invalid value is passed, the system uses the default theme color: black in light mode and white in dark mode.

NOTE:
This attribute applies only to SVG images.
This attribute does not take effect when the parameter type of the component is AnimatedDrawableDescriptor.
Sets how the image is resized to fit its container.
注释信息: @param { ImageFit } value - How the image is resized to fit its container, Default value is ImageFit.Cover.

parameters.说明: How the image is resized to fit its container, Default value is ImageFit.Cover.

节点.功能描述: Sets the transformation matrix of the image.
注释信息: @param { ImageMatrix } matrix - Transformation matrix of the image.

parameters.说明: Transformation matrix of the image.

节点.功能描述:
Set the repeat style of the picture

NOTE:
This attribute is not applicable to SVG images.
This attribute does not take effect when the parameter type of the component is AnimatedDrawableDescriptor.
注释信息: @param { ImageRepeat } value - How the image is repeated, Default value is ImageRepeat.NoRepeat.

parameters.说明: How the image is repeated, Default value is ImageRepeat.NoRepeat.

节点.功能描述:
Specifies whether to resize the image source based on the size of the display area during image decoding.

NOTE:
This attribute does not take effect when the parameter type of the component is AnimatedDrawableDescriptor or SVG.

during image decoding, Default value is false.
注释信息: @param { boolean } value - Whether to resize the image source based on the size of the display area

parameters.说明: Whether to resize the image source based on the size of the display area

节点.功能描述:
Sets the rendering mode of the image.

NOTE:
This attribute is not applicable to SVG images.
When ColorFilter is set, this attribute is not effective.
This attribute does not take effect when the parameter type of the component is AnimatedDrawableDescriptor.
注释信息: @param { ImageRenderMode } value - Rendering mode of the image, Default value is ImageRenderMode.Original.

parameters.说明: Rendering mode of the image, Default value is ImageRenderMode.Original.

节点.功能描述:
Sets the dynamic range of the image to be displayed.

NOTE:
This attribute is not applicable to SVG images.
注释信息: @param { DynamicRangeMode } value - Dynamic range of the image, Default value is DynamicRangeMode.Standard.

parameters.说明: Dynamic range of the image, Default value is DynamicRangeMode.Standard.

节点.功能描述: Set hdrBrightness for Image.
注释信息: @param { number } brightness - Control the brightness of HDR Image, Default value is 1.0.

parameters.说明: Control the brightness of HDR Image, Default value is 1.0.

节点.功能描述:
Sets the interpolation effect of the image, which can alleviate aliasing that occurs when the image is zoomed.

NOTE:
This attribute is not applicable to SVG images.
This attribute does not take effect when the parameter type of the component is AnimatedDrawableDescriptor.
注释信息: @param { ImageInterpolation } value - Interpolation effect of the image, Default value is ImageInterpolation.Low.

parameters.说明: Interpolation effect of the image, Default value is ImageInterpolation.Low.

节点.功能描述:
Sets the decoding size of the image. The original picture is decoded into a picture of a specified size. Anonymous Object Rectification.

NOTE:
This attribute works only when the target size is smaller than the source size.
This attribute is not applicable to SVG images or PixelMap objects.
This attribute does not take effect when the parameter type of the component is AnimatedDrawableDescriptor.
注释信息: @param { ImageSourceSize } value - Decoding size of the image.

parameters.说明: Decoding size of the image.

节点.功能描述:
Specifies whether to load the image synchronously.

NOTE:
This attribute does not take effect when the parameter type of the component is AnimatedDrawableDescriptor.
注释信息: @param { boolean } value - Whether to load the image synchronously, Default value is false.

parameters.说明: Whether to load the image synchronously, Default value is false.

节点.功能描述:
Sets the color filter for the image.

NOTE:
When this attribute is set, renderMode is not effective.
注释信息: @param { ColorFilter | DrawingColorFilter } value -  Color filter of the image.

parameters.说明: Color filter of the image.

节点.功能描述:
Whether the image can be copied. NOTE:
SVG images cannot be copied.
This attribute does not take effect when the parameter type of the component is AnimatedDrawableDescriptor.
注释信息: @param { CopyOptions } value - Specifies whether the image can be copied, Default value is CopyOptions.None.

parameters.说明: Specifies whether the image can be copied, Default value is CopyOptions.None.

节点.功能描述: Specifies whether the image is draggable.
注释信息: @param { boolean } value - Whether the image is draggable, Default value is true.

parameters.说明: Whether the image is draggable, Default value is true.

节点.功能描述: Defines the PointLight
注释信息: @param { PointLightStyle } value - The point light style.
@returns { ImageAttribute } The attribute of the image.

parameters.说明: The point light style.

节点.功能描述: SVG anti-aliasing. The range of the parameter values is (0.333, 1.333]. Default value is 0.0.
注释信息: @param { number } value - The degree of anti-aliasing.
@returns { ImageAttribute } The attribute of the image.

parameters.说明: The degree of anti-aliasing.

节点.功能描述:
Triggered when an image is successfully loaded or decoded. The size of the image source that is successfully loaded is returned, in pixels.

NOTE:
This event is not triggered if the parameter type of the component is AnimatedDrawableDescriptor.

Defines Image Component.

If flickering occurs during image loading, set syncLoad to true. For details, see [Concurrency Optimization]{@link https://developer.huawei.com/consumer/en/doc/best-practices/bpta-click-to-click-response-optimization}

If white blocks persist during image loading, follow the steps in [Solution to White Image Blocks]{@link https://developer.huawei.com/consumer/en/doc/best-practices/bpta-image-white-lump-solution}

If image loading takes a long time, follow the steps in [Reducing the Loading Time of Preset Images]{@link https://developer.huawei.com/consumer/en/doc/best-practices/bpta-texture-compression-improve-performance}
Defines Image Component instance.
